title: Recipe 4 for Avibacterium paragallinarum Strains from Yangzhou University

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bcwbk","text":"- Brain heart infusion agar: 52,000 mg","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9prjh","text":"- Horse blood: 100 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7pco6","text":"- Formate solution: 100 ml (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":16},{"style":"italic","offset":27,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"lkhw2","text":"- Fumaric acid solution: 100 ml (optional)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":21},{"style":"italic","offset":32,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ivfzk","text":"- NAD: 10 mg (added)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":3},{"style":"italic","offset":13,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rdljj","text":"- Hemin: 5 mg (added)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":5},{"style":"italic","offset":14,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"nos5t","text":"- Water: 1,000 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":2,"length":5}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare the following materials for the cultivation of Avibacterium paragallinarum strains: - Brain heart infusion agar : 52,000 mg - Horse blood : 100 ml - Formate solution : 100 ml (optional) - Fumaric acid solution : 100 ml (optional) - NAD : 10 mg (added) - Hemin : 5 mg (added) - Water : 1,000 ml

Optional: Formate/fumaric acid solutions. The absence of formate and fumaric acid might slightly reduce growth efficiency under anaerobic conditions, but this typically wouldn’t prevent successful cultivation.
Notes: Blood provides X/V factors; incubate anaerobically.
creator: wujunfeng
